evals.prompt: Vamos a trabajar en implementar el módulo de autenticación de usuarios.
assertions: Creates doc/agents-sessions/ directory if it doesn't exist
Creates a session file with format YYYYMMDD-001-CLAUDE.md
Session file contains initial metadata (agent name, date, start time)
Session file contains an objective about user authentication module (not just placeholder text)
Session file sections are properly initialized (Resumen, Objetivos, Trabajo Realizado, etc.) with appropriate content or clear placeholders
Session file uses Spanish (Spain) language for all content
Informs user about session documentation location in the response
Response is concise (under 200 characters) and actionable

evals.prompt: He implementado la función de login con JWT. Los archivos modificados son src/auth/login.js y src/middleware/auth.js. He decidido usar JWT en lugar de sessions por escalabilidad.
assertions: Updates existing session file (doesn't create new one)
Adds new work section with timestamp
Documents modified files: src/auth/login.js and src/middleware/auth.js
Records technical decision about JWT vs sessions
Includes the scalability reasoning
Updates 'Hora de últimos trabajos' in metadata
Doesn't rewrite entire file, only adds incremental update

evals.prompt: ¿Qué hemos hecho hasta ahora en esta sesión?
assertions: Reads current session file
Provides executive summary of work done
Lists completed objectives
Shows time invested
References session file location
Summary is concise (not full session dump)

evals.prompt: Cierra la sesión. La próxima vez voy a trabajar en la integración con el frontend.
assertions: Updates session file with final state
Adds metrics (duration, files modified, etc.)
Adds 'Próximos Pasos' section with frontend integration
Sets 'Estado final' to 'Completada'
Adds 'Próxima sesión' note about frontend work
Confirms session closure to user

evals.prompt: Nueva sesión: voy a trabajar en optimizar la base de datos.

files.content:
# Sesión Agente: 20260209-001-CLAUDE

* **Agente de IA:** Claude (Sonnet 4.5)
* **Fecha creación:** 9 de febrero de 2026
* **Hora de inicio:** 14:15
* **Hora de últimos trabajos:** 16:42

---

## Estado final: Completada

assertions: Detects existing session from same day (001)
Creates new session file: 20260209-002-CLAUDE.md
New session has correct incremental number (002)
New session has fresh metadata
New session has objective about database optimization
Doesn't modify previous session file (001)

evals.prompt: He añadido un índice a la tabla users. Usa modo conciso para documentar.
assertions: Documents the change in 2-3 lines maximum
Includes file modified (implied database migration or similar)
Includes basic result (index added)
Doesn't include extensive metrics or details
Timestamp is present
Updates last work time

evals.prompt: Implementé un sistema de caché Redis completo. Usa modo detallado para documentar esto.
assertions: Creates detailed documentation section
Includes comprehensive description of Redis cache implementation
Documents architectural decisions with alternatives considered
Includes code snippets or references if relevant
Documents all modified/created files
Includes detailed metrics (lines added/removed, performance impact)
Explains WHY Redis was chosen (tradeoffs)

evals.prompt: Encontré un bug crítico en la autenticación. Lo resolví cambiando la validación de tokens. Documenta esto como problema resuelto.
assertions: Creates section in 'Problemas Encontrados' or similar
Documents WHAT the bug was (critical auth issue)
Documents HOW it was solved (token validation change)
Includes prevention/learning if applicable
Marks this as important (⚠️ or similar indicator)
References files modified for the fix
